name: services_list
description: List all services in your Render account. Returns service names, IDs, types, current status, and service URLs. Supports filtering by type, name, region, environment, suspension status, and pagination via cursor.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by service type: web_service, static_site, private_service, background_worker, cron_job.

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Filter by runtime: node, python, docker, go, rust, ruby, elixir.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Filter by region: oregon, ohio, virginia, frankfurt, singapore.

parameters.name: suspended
parameters.description: Filter by suspension status: suspended, not_suspended.
